scaleStep.description: The smallest step. Use for tight groupings such as the gap between an icon and its label.
scaleStep.name: xs

scaleStep.description: Default internal padding for compact components like badges and tags.
scaleStep.name: sm

scaleStep.description: The base unit. Use for default internal component padding and the gap between related fields.
scaleStep.name: md

scaleStep.description: Separates distinct groups within a section.
scaleStep.name: lg

scaleStep.description: Separates major sections of a page.
scaleStep.name: xl

scale.name: Spacing Scale
scale.description: A 4px-based progression that constrains all spacing decisions to a consistent set of steps. Each step doubles or adds the base unit so adjacent values stay visually distinct. Use the nearest step rather than a custom value; deviation is appropriate only for optical alignment that the scale cannot express.

steps.description: The base unit — default component padding.
steps.name: md
